name: New Century Advisors, LLC
message: Since its founding in 2002, New Century Advisors has partnered with its clients to develop and execute customized strategies to meet their unique needs including core, inflation-linked, short duration, multi asset and equity strategies.New Century Advisors prides itself in seeking to deliver superior risk-adjusted returns with a high touch client service approach. New Century Advisors' clients represent prestigious public funds, corporations, endowments, foundations, healthcare systems and insurance companies.New Century Advisors is entirely employee owned and its principals have worked together for over 10 years
